COUNSEL APPEARED. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING, DEFENDANT SAN PABLO AUTOMOTIVE MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED - TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT EXISTS RE: EXPOSURE TO ASBESTOS CONTAINING PRODUCTS SUPPLIED BY DEFENDANT PER DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF AND DEPOSITION OF PLAINTIFF MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION RE FALSE REPRESENTAION AND INTENTIONAL TORT - DENIED FAILURE TO BEAR BURDON OF PRODUCING EVIDENCE.
